# viettelidc_ovpc_launch_templates (Data Source)

List all ViettelIDC Launch Templates in a VPC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "viettelidc_ovpc_launch_templates" "all" {
  vpc_id = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
}

output "template_names" {
  value = [for t in data.viettelidc_ovpc_launch_templates.all.launch_templates : t.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC filter; falls back to provider default.

### Read-Only

- `launch_templates` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--launch_templates))

<a id="nestedatt--launch_templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `launch_templates`

Read-Only:

- `cpu_size` (Number) Number of vCPUs.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `id` (String) Launch Template ID.
- `memory_size` (Number) Memory size in GB.
- `name` (String) Template name.
- `vm_id` (String) Source VM ID.
